title: Comforting Creamy Saudi Arabian Lamb Pasta
description: A hearty and comforting dish featuring paccheri pasta, tender lamb, and a rich tadka sauce, inspired by the flavors of Saudi Arabia
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the paccheri pasta according to the package instructions until al dente
In a large skillet, heat the ghee over medium-high heat and sear the lamb pieces until browned on all sides
Remove the lamb from the skillet and set aside, then add the chopped onion and cook until softened and translucent
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant
Stir in the ground cumin and coriander and cook for 1 minute, until the spices are fragrant
Add the cooked lamb back to the skillet and stir to combine with the spices and onion mixture
Pour in the canned coconut milk and bring the mixture to a simmer
Reduce the heat to low and let the sauce simmer for 10 minutes, until the lamb is tender and the sauce has thickened
Stir in the salt and black pepper to taste, then add the cooked paccheri pasta to the skillet and toss to combine with the sauce
Serve the pasta hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired
